summary: US-018 is fully implemented. Bass-to-macro-motion pipeline: computeBassAvg() averages bottom 25% frequency bins, EMA smoothing (α=0.12) prevents jitter, synthetic fallback (30+25*sin) ensures motion when muted, bassToMacro() applies power curve (0.7) normalization, and particleField applies bassBoost (1+bassEnergy*2) as velocity multiplier with toroidal wrapping for bounds safety. All 6 tests pass and build succeeds.
